content.scenarioHint: 你希望庆祝朋友最近取得的成就，提议一起吃晚饭并主动提出请客，现在你正在向对方发出邀请。
expectedAnswers: We should celebrate this! Let me take you out to dinner this Friday.
This calls for a celebration—how about dinner on me this week?
I really want to celebrate your success—would you be up for dinner this Friday? My treat!
Congrats on everything! Let’s grab dinner and I’ll pay.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了庆祝意图并提出请客邀请
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常对话习惯，语气友好不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了'celebrate', 'dinner', 'on me/my treat'等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你希望邀请对方一起吃饭，庆祝他最近取得的成就，现在你正提出这个提议，期待对方的回应。
expectedAnswers: Let's celebrate your achievement with dinner this week!
I’d love to take you out to dinner to celebrate how amazing you’ve done!
How about we grab a meal to mark this big win for you?
Would you be up for a celebratory dinner? I really want to honor your success.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了庆祝成就并邀请吃饭的意图
语言准确性：语法正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了'celebrate', 'dinner/meal', 'achievement/success'等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I just finished my project after months of hard work!
content.speakerTextCn: 我终于完成了这个花了好几个月的项目！
expectedAnswers: That’s amazing! Let’s go out for a fancy dinner—I’m buying!
Wow, you killed it! How about a toast at my place this weekend?
So proud of you! Let’s celebrate with your favorite food!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：识别成就并主动提议庆祝
语言准确性：使用自然口语表达（killed it, I’m buying, toast）
表达自然度：语气热情、有感染力，符合朋友间庆祝语境
关键词覆盖：使用 celebrate / dinner / toast / hard work 等场景关键词
